ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-Keeping Unit, a unique identifier for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (length, width, height) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is featured */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product has been deleted */,
  "last_sold_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last sold */,
  "average_delivery_time" REAL /* Average time it takes to deliver the product */,
  "return_policy" TEXT /* Return policy for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category, allowing for hierarchical categories */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the review */,
  "review_image_urls" TEXT /* URLs of images uploaded with the review */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the review */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is anonymous */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review has been approved */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review has been deleted */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "not_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review not helpful */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response from the seller */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, seller, admin) */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_scores" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the review (0-1) */,
  "positive_words" TEXT /* List of positive words in the review */,
  "negative_words" TEXT /* List of negative words in the review */,
  "neutral_words" TEXT /* List of neutral words in the review */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment score */,
  "sentiment_model_version" TEXT /* Version of the sentiment analysis model used */,
  "sentiment_analysis_timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the sentiment was analyzed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selected_words" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "word" TEXT /* Selected word from the review */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of the selected word in the review */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the selected word (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the word in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "word")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_metrics" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "awesome" INTEGER /* Count of the word 'awesome' in the review */,
  "great" INTEGER /* Count of the word 'great' in the review */,
  "fantastic" INTEGER /* Count of the word 'fantastic' in the review */,
  "positive_keywords_count" INTEGER /* Count of positive keywords in the review */,
  "negative_keywords_count" INTEGER /* Count of negative keywords in the review */,
  "neutral_keywords_count" INTEGER /* Count of neutral keywords in the review */,
  "sentiment_trend" TEXT /* Trend of sentiment over time (e.g., improving, declining) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_ratings" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  "positive_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of positive reviews */,
  "negative_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of negative reviews */,
  "neutral_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of neutral reviews */,
  "most_common_positive_keywords" TEXT /* Most common positive keywords in reviews */,
  "most_common_negative_keywords" TEXT /* Most common negative keywords in reviews */,
  "review_trend" TEXT /* Trend of review ratings over time (e.g., improving, declining) */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last review */,
  "first_review_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the first review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role is the default role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
